## Validation

## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] No real sensitive tender/customer/company/personnel data
- [ ] No fabricated qualifications, certificates, cases, or staff information
- [ ] No bid rigging, collusion, market manipulation, or unfair competition guidance
- [ ] Uncertain generated content is marked as requiring manual confirmation
- [ ] Compliance conclusions remain assistive and require human review
